case_title: MEJIA, CARLOS VS MIANMAZHAR, KHOMAR C/O ATTY JACOBSEN RUBEN B et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,988.00 FILED BY MEJIA, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT MIANMAZHAR, KHOMAR C/O ATTY JACOBSEN RUBEN B YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC, YELLOW CAB CO. ET AL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM IS CORRECTED TO REFLECT THE TRUE AMOUNT OF THE CLAIM AS ORDERED TRANSFFERRED IN MUNICIPAL COURT.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MIANMAZHAR, KHOMAR C/O ATTY JACOBSEN RUBEN B YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC, YELLOW CAB CO. ET AL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MEJIA, CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEJIA, CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIANMAZHAR, KHOMAR C/O ATTY JACOBSEN RUBEN B YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC, YELLOW CAB CO. ET AL $3,070.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MIANMAZHAR, KHOMAR C/O ATTY JACOBSEN RUBEN B YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE INC, YELLOW CAB CO. ET AL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MEJIA, CARLOS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
